newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The FY (Mar-2026) prelims were released June 3 and the prior FY trading update (Q4 orders/sales acceleration across Magnetics & Controls and Sensing & Connectivity) earlier - both pre-June 9 and already in the prior cases.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: under-followed power/connectivity supplier remains a high-conviction hidden gem at rank 4. June 3 prelims (order recovery, orders ahead of sales) already priced June 9; nothing new since. Thesis intact at small cap (~$0.9B) keeps the residual-alpha case but no fresh catalyst to re-rank. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Small-cap (~$0.9B), under-owned power & connectivity supplier with accelerating orders - high residual alpha vs crowded passives names.
verdicts.neutral: Order recovery confirmed but already in price after the June 3 prelims; no new datapoint since.
verdicts.bear: Industrial-cycle sensitivity and modest +18% YTD; AI exposure is indirect via edge/electrification rather than direct compute.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Order recovery, margin-target upgrade and bolt-on M&A

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent AI supply-chain lens: custom industrial sensing/power compounder can quietly supply edge-AI/electrification without AI branding - a strong fit. Prelims (Jun 3) confirm broad order recovery but predate June 9 and are priced. No new evidence, so hold the high-conviction rank.
verdicts.bull: Customised sensing + power niches feed edge-AI and electrification; orders growing organically for multiple quarters.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine latent exposure but diffused across many industrial end-markets; AI is one driver among several.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical industrial base; valuation has re-rated and AI tie is inferential.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Operating-margin target upgrade and continued order recovery
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial cycle and integration risk on acquisitions

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict screen: custom sensing/control adaptable to coolant sensing / edge telemetry - speculative pathway unchanged since June 9. Prelims confirm order recovery but give no AI-chain-specific evidence. Speculative-pathway score stands; hold.
verdicts.bull: Custom electronic components could be adapted to coolant sensing and edge-device telemetry in AI hardware.
verdicts.neutral: Adaptation pathway is qualitative; no direct AI-node design wins disclosed.
verdicts.bear: Strict AI-bottleneck purity is low; demand is broad-industrial, not compute-specific.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Design wins in coolant/edge telemetry sensing
verdicts.primaryRisk: Pathway remains speculative without AI-specific orders
